evidence_label: curated PubMed E-utilities quote-acceptance refresh, not treatment advice

records.role: 2026 non-editing HbF pharmacology signal; high-caution assay benchmark only
records.title: Discovery of a Novel DNMT1 Inhibitor with Improved Efficacy in Treating beta-Thalassemia

records.role: beta-thalassemia/HbE erythroid progenitor HbF induction benchmark
records.title: Enhanced induction of fetal hemoglobin by the combination of decitabine with RN-1 in beta-thalassemia/HbE erythroid progenitor cells
Circ_0001428 regulates erythropoiesis and gamma-globin expression via activating the ATF4-BCL11A axis in beta-thalassemia

records.role: Southeast Asia alpha-thalassemia erythroid model context
records.title: Establishment of an immortalized erythroid model for Hb Bart's hydrops fetalis with homozygous alpha(0)-thalassemia Southeast Asian deletion

records.role: plasma heme assay context for hemolysis and severity markers
records.title: A Novel Plasma Heme Assay Reveals Disease Severity in Beta-Thalassemia and Sickle Cell Anemia

records.role: phenotype-marker context, not first-quote efficacy readout
records.title: Extracellular Vesicles in Beta-Thalassemia: Phenotype-Specific Profiles and Potential Clinical Associations

decision_use: Current sources support stricter assay acceptance, not clinical use. HbF-only or high-caution epigenetic signals remain benchmark/probe context unless full safety and multi-endpoint gates are available.
